product.title: Hush Foundation for Older Women,Warm，Perfect for Light Medium Complexions,Mushroom Head Air Cushion CC Cream,BB Cream Foundation Soft and Hydrating Lightweight Lasting Full Coverage
featureBullets: Formulated for Mature Skin – This cushion foundation is specially designed for women 40+ with aging concerns: it hydrates dry patches, blurs fine lines (not settles into them!), and delivers smooth, even coverage without looking cakey or heavy.

Flawless Warm Tone for Light-Medium Skin – The “Warm” shade blends seamlessly into light to medium complexions with golden or peachy undertones, offering natural-looking radiance—never ashy or orange.

Air-Cushion Technology for Effortless Application – The innovative mushroom-head puff picks up just the right amount of product for buildable, streak-free coverage. Lightweight yet full-coverage, it evens out redness, age spots, and discoloration in seconds.

Hydrating & Skin-Loving Formula – Infused with moisturizing ingredients to keep mature skin comfortable all day—no flaking, creasing, or tightness. Breathable, non-drying, and gentle on sensitive skin.

Long-Wearing, Natural Finish That Stays Put – Enjoy all-day wear that resists fading while maintaining a soft, luminous (not shiny) finish. Compact and travel-friendly—perfect for touch-ups on the go.

specification.value: Buildable coverage, Hydrating, Long-wearing, Blurs fine lines
#21,086 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #214 in Foundation Makeup

reviews.reviewText: I've never worn face makeup because it's so thick and looks unnatural. Hush is light and blends in with my skin color. It evens out any discoloration and I don't feel or see any makeup., yet I look better!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 17, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Get lighter color than you wear
reviews.reviewText: Does not even come close to what is says. It just sits on your face
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 27, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Easy application. Great coverage. Smudge proof
reviews.reviewText: Love this makeup. Brush and compact make easy application. Coverage is great. Does not rub off.
